author: kellybrendan
description: A JSON-based life timeline. Group events under colored eras, add events with date ranges, and edit everything inline. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: kellybrendan
manifest.description: A JSON-based life timeline. Group events under colored eras, add events with date ranges, and edit everything inline.

name: Life Timeline

releases.author: kellybrendan
releases.description:
First release of Life Timeline.

A JSON-based life timeline for Obsidian. Group events under colored eras, add events with optional date ranges, and edit everything inline.
